name: Dirty Berlin Adult Cartoon
line_style: Thick black outlines, ugly-funny silhouettes, intentionally rough 2D shapes, no clean luxury polish.
character_rules: Every main character has one instantly readable silhouette.
Dompe always looks tired and slightly humiliated.
The cats stay visually cute but emotionally terrifying.
VØID's helmet must read like a ridiculous black LED trashcan.
Facial expressions are exaggerated, not realistic.
background_rules: Friedrichshain freak house looks dirty, crowded and improvised.
Club scenes use simple dark shapes, red light and fog blocks.
Backgrounds support the joke and never steal the frame.
Use recurring props: Pfand bottles, broken synths, flyers, ashtrays, mold, cables.
camera_rules: Vertical 9:16 framing for Reels, TikTok and Shorts.
Use close-ups for panic, deadpan faces and punchlines.
Use split screen for phone calls, club vs backpack and character contrast.
Avoid wide crowd shots unless simplified.
negative_rules: No glossy Pixar or Disney look.
No direct copy of existing IP, series, artists or characters.
No random outfit changes for recurring characters.
No overly complex physical interactions without storyboard control.
